overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character leaving a traditional Japanese-style room, moving through a neon-lit pachinko parlor, and walking through a rainy cyberpunk city street at night before entering a narrow foggy alleyway. The scene transitions from warm interior lighting to vibrant neon pink and blue arcade lights, then to the wet reflective streets of Night City.

events.description: approaching the beaded curtain doorway at the far end of the room

agents.ego_description: moving through the traditional room, panning left to observe the space before heading toward the exit

notable_agents.action: seated on the floor at a low table near the paper screen

entered.detail: large golden dragon painted on the right wall with decorative motifs
small manicured tree in a pot against the back wall
traditional Japanese sliding paper screens covering the left wall
dark wooden storage cabinet against the back wall
warm glowing lamp on a low table providing ambient lighting
doorway covered with red beaded curtains leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit traditional Japanese room with warm amber lighting from a floor lamp. A large golden dragon mural dominates the right wall, while paper shoji screens cover the left. A bonsai tree and wooden cabinet decorate the back wall near a beaded curtain doorway. The player character moves slowly through the space, passing a seated NPC, and approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pachinko parlor with gaming machines and pink ambient lighting

events.description: passing through the beaded curtain into the neon-lit arcade area
moving toward the street exit, passing rows of pachinko machines

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow arcade corridor, passing players at gaming machines while heading toward the street exit

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair leaning on a counter, looking at a screen
man in white shirt sitting and playing a pachinko machine

entered.detail: row of brightly lit pachinko machines with colorful displays and the word PACHINKO visible
pink and purple neon lighting illuminating the corridor
rotating ceiling fan with purple lighting above the corridor
service counter with a window where the red-haired woman stands

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly from the warm traditional room to a narrow corridor bathed in vibrant pink and purple neon light. Rows of pachinko machines line the right wall while a service counter occupies the left. The player moves past a woman at the counter and a man playing the machines, proceeding toward the street exit visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk commercial street with neon storefronts and wet reflective pavement

events.description: exiting the arcade onto the wet city street with neon signs visible
turning slightly while walking past the Bliss storefront and red lantern

agents.ego_description: walking down the rainy cyberpunk street, navigating between pedestrians and observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing near the Bliss storefront entrance

entered.detail: large cursive neon sign reading Bliss above a storefront with mannequins in the window
large glowing red paper lantern hanging above the street
red neon sign reading SEX SHOP on the building facade
large illuminated billboard displaying GET CARBINE advertisement
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the arcade, the scene opens onto a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night. The wet pavement reflects the glow of a large red paper lantern and the cursive Bliss neon sign. The player walks past a sex shop and various pedestrians, heading toward a large digital billboard advertising weapons, with the city buildings towering on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with green walls, fluorescent lighting, and atmospheric fog

events.description: entering the narrow foggy alleyway from the open street

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the narrow foggy alleyway, passing a lone figure standing against the wall

notable_agents.action: person standing against the left wall in the alley, partially illuminated by fluorescent light

entered.detail: tight concrete walls of the alleyway with greenish paint and industrial fixtures
harsh white fluorescent lights mounted on the ceiling of the alley
green wall with red graffiti text including TIGER CLINIC and Chinese characters

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow, claustrophobic alleyway with green-painted concrete walls and harsh fluorescent lighting. Steam or fog fills the corridor, partially obscuring the view ahead. The player passes a lone figure standing against the left wall beneath the buzzing lights, with graffiti covering the right wall, creating an atmosphere of urban decay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a serene, traditional Japanese interior into the chaotic, neon-drenched urban decay of a cyberpunk city. It begins in a dimly lit room with warm amber lighting, passing a golden dragon mural and shoji screens before moving through a beaded curtain. The scene then shifts abruptly into a narrow corridor saturated in vibrant pink and purple neon, where the camera glides past rows of pachinko machines and a service counter toward the street. Upon exiting the arcade, the environment opens onto a rain-soaked night street where wet pavement reflects red lanterns and glowing signs beneath towering skyscrapers. Finally, the camera turns away from the main thoroughfare and enters a claustrophobic, fog-filled alleyway characterized by green concrete walls, buzzing fluorescent lights, and graffiti.
